title: October 22
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|October}}

'''October 22''' is the 295th day of the year (296th in leap years), with 70 days remaining.</noinclude>
*[[1930s#1937|1937]] – [[Alan Ladd, Jr.]] is born.
*[[1940s#1946|1946]] – [[Richard McGonagle]] is born.
*[[1950s#1958|1958]] – [[Michael Price]] is born.
*[[1960s#1962|1962]] – [[Michael Heisler]] is born.
*[[1980]] – [[The Empire Strikes Back Weekly 139|''The Empire Strikes Back Weekly'' 139]] published.
*[[1997]] – [[Tales of the Jedi – The Fall of the Sith Empire 5|''Tales of the Jedi – The Fall of the Sith Empire'' 5]] published.
*[[1998]] – ''[[Star Wars: Incredible Cross-Sections]]'' published.
*[[2003]] – [[Empire 12|''Empire'' 12]] published.
*[[2008]] – [[Knights of the Old Republic 34|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 34]] published.
*[[2010]] – "[[Assassin (episode)|Assassin]]" first airs on [[Cartoon Network]].
*[[2013]] – [[Star Wars Insider 145|''Star Wars Insider'' 145]] published.
*[[2016]] – "[[The Last Battle]]" airs on [[Disney XD]].
*[[2019]] – ''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic: Onslaught]]'' released.
*[[2021]] – [[Star Wars Rebels (webcomic)|''Star Wars Rebels'']] manga adaptation ended serialization in Japan.
*[[2025]] – [[Jedi Knights 8|''Jedi Knights'' 8]] published.
*2025 – [[Tales From the Nightlands 2|''Tales From the Nightlands'' 2]] published.
<noinclude>
